creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 177562
Adding the patch from Mike FABIAN

I am currently porting ibus-typing-booster, and I encountered an error already reported by the author in m17n-lib.

See https://github.com/mike-fabian/ibus-typing-booster/issues/5
https://lists.nongnu.org/archive/html/m17n-list/2015-08/msg00001.html
and https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1256244

The first chunck of the proposed patch is already part of version 1.7.0 in the ports tree, but the other are missing.

The attached patch adds them.

Since I'm here, define the license and add missing xorg libs.
